landing.hero_subtitle: Reels-first commerce for India. Find vendors and creators near you, negotiate over chat, no middlemen — just fair local deals.

features.reels_body: Scroll through short videos of vendors, shops and creators around you.
features.chat_body: No agents, no forwards. Negotiate the price yourself.
features.trust_body: Verified badges, reviews and a trust score for every seller.

auth.login_subtitle: Enter your mobile number to continue.
auth.verify_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to +91 {{phone}}
auth.dev_banner: DEV MODE OTP: {{otp}} — auto-filled for you.

onboarding.title: Tell us about you
onboarding.subtitle: Pick a name and how you'll use Emergent. You can add more roles later.
onboarding.roles_label: I want to use Emergent as
onboarding.role_customer_desc: Discover and hire local vendors, shops & creators.
onboarding.role_vendor_desc: List my shop or service and get customers.
onboarding.role_creator_desc: Get hired for shoots, content & collaborations.

dashboard.stub_body: Phase 0 delivers the auth foundation. Reels-first discovery, chat, requirements and vendor listings arrive in upcoming phases.

browse.title: Browse
browse.subtitle: Local vendors, shops & creators near you.
browse.empty: No listings yet — be the first to post!

listing.chat_coming_soon: Chat is coming in Phase 3. WhatsApp deep-link is on the way.

vendor.empty: You haven't listed anything yet. Post your first item to start getting customers.
vendor.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this listing? This cannot be undone.
vendor.become_vendor_body: You'll be able to list products & services and get customers chatting directly. This is free.

common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

feed.title: For you
feed.location_prompt_title: Turn on location for near-you feed
feed.location_prompt_body: See listings and reels near you first. You can change this anytime.
feed.reels_empty: No reels yet in your area. Widen the radius or check back soon.

search.no_results: No listings match. Try a different phrase.

watch_modal.title: Watch this listing
watch_modal.body: Get an SMS on price drop or when the vendor updates. No login needed.

saved_page.title: Saved
saved_page.subtitle: Listings you've bookmarked.
saved_page.empty: Nothing saved yet. Tap the bookmark on any listing to save it.
